attempted_headline: A reduced black-hole state space is operational.
allowed_headline: A reduced black-hole projection is operational in the tested simulation and survey branches.
forbidden_headline: A full four-coordinate black-hole HRSM space has been established.

attempted_headline: Specific black-hole accretion rate is an admitted H reserve coordinate.
allowed_headline: Specific accretion rate is used provisionally as a forcing or throughput coordinate.
forbidden_headline: Specific accretion rate has been validated as adaptive reserve.

attempted_headline: S measures distance from a class-conditioned equilibrium.
allowed_headline: S is an equilibrium-distance coordinate only where code, configuration, and equation use a concordant residual construction.
forbidden_headline: Every current S construction measures equilibrium distance.

attempted_headline: The Tier 1 potential is a two-coordinate homeostatic geometry.
allowed_headline: The Tier 1 composite is exploratory until redundancy and noise-matched effective dimensionality are audited.
forbidden_headline: H and S are independent homeostatic axes.

attempted_headline: Ripeness dispersion declines robustly with final black-hole mass.
allowed_headline: In the frozen TNG Tier 1 branch, residence-based ripeness has a negative dispersion slope under the declared estimators, subject to provenance, effective-unit, and construction-null caps.
forbidden_headline: Black holes universally converge toward one homeostatic state as mass increases.

attempted_headline: Median-potential dispersion declines robustly with mass.
allowed_headline: The ordinary-variance median-potential trend is tail dominated and fails robust re-estimation.
forbidden_headline: Median potential provides a robust compression law.

attempted_headline: The GAMA D4000-offset branch provides observational support.
allowed_headline: The GAMA D4000-offset branch is a directional, three-bin, resolution-limited observational analogue.
forbidden_headline: GAMA establishes a universal observational black-hole compression law.

attempted_headline: The GAMA sigma-star branch is the strongest observational black-hole result.
allowed_headline: The GAMA sigma-star construction is numerically quarantined pending clean reconstruction and target-side independence checks.
forbidden_headline: The quarantined sigma-star slope is confirmatory evidence.

attempted_headline: The MaNGA IFU branch supports universal variance compression.
allowed_headline: MaNGA demonstrates survey-scale portability but refuses a universal compression law.
forbidden_headline: MaNGA confirms universal black-hole homeostatic compression.

attempted_headline: The weighted ripeness score is a validated black-hole maturity scale.
allowed_headline: The score is an exploratory contextual ranking whose component and rank stability can be audited.
forbidden_headline: The score measures intrinsic black-hole maturity.

attempted_headline: Extreme settlement outliers are violently disturbed black holes.
allowed_headline: Extreme settlement outliers are candidates for independent merger and host-disturbance validation.
forbidden_headline: Settlement residuals alone prove violent disturbance.

attempted_headline: The present paper activates retained-history coordinate M.
allowed_headline: Memory remains unactivated until a frozen generator ladder survives admitted finite augmentations and time-order nulls.
forbidden_headline: Residence fraction is itself proof of dynamical memory.

attempted_headline: The present paper activates recoverability coordinate R.
allowed_headline: Recoverability remains unactivated until an information-time-valid R predicts an independent later recovery event.
forbidden_headline: Post-event return time is automatically a predictive recoverability coordinate.

attempted_headline: A full black-hole HRSM space has been established.
allowed_headline: The current evidence supports at most a reduced Tier 1 projection while R and M remain future tests.
forbidden_headline: All four HRSM coordinates are empirically active in black holes.
